NWS STORM SURVEY CONFIRMS AN EF0 TORNADO DEVELOPED NEAR EAGLE LAKE, TRACKING EAST ABOUT 3 MILES BEFORE DISSIPATING. NUMEROUS TREES WERE BENT OR UPROOTED ALONG THE PATH WITH NO KNOWN SIGNIFICANT DAMAGE TO PROPERTY OUTSIDE OF THE MANY TREES THAT FELL.

MULTIPLE PHOTOS SENT VIA SOCIAL MEDIA OF NUMEROUS DOWNED TREES AND POWER LINES. MOST TREES WERE SNAPPED NEAR THE BASE AND ONLY A COUPLE WERE UPROOTED. OBSERVER ALSO REPORTS THAT MULTIPLE NEIGHBORS HAD DECKS AND ROOFS RIPPED UP. OBSERVER ESTIMATES OVER 100 TREES THAT HAD STOOD FOR A LONG TIME WERE LOST IN A SMALL AREA. TIME FROM OBSERVER REPORT.
